title: ginoria lanceolata
intro: Ginoria lanceolata is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known for its medicinal properties and uses. The plant is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Ginoria lanceolata are attributed to its bioactive compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Ginoria lanceolata is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and has been used to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism.
